mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, is_default DESC
SELECT * FROM payment_accounts WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM payment_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_accounts SET is_default = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_accounts (user_id, account_type_id, name, masked_identifier, is_default, is_active, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountTypeId}, #{name}, #{maskedIdentifier}, #{isDefault}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update:
UPDATE payment_accounts
name = #{name}, masked_identifier = #{maskedIdentifier}, account_type_id = #{accountTypeId}, is_default = #{isDefault}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE payment_accounts SET is_default = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId}; UPDATE payment_accounts SET is_default = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id};
UPDATE payment_accounts SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
